name: Data Review
description: Audit, clean, validate, and version your data. Schema checks, outlier detection, class balance, drift baselines.

name: Feature Engineering
description: Create derived features, statistical filtering, VIF pruning, domain validation. For DL: input representation design.

name: Model Design
description: Architecture selection, loss function design, training strategy. Optimizer, LR schedule, mixed precision, checkpointing.

name: Training & Iteration
description: Baseline training, diagnostics, autonomous iteration loop. Cross-validation, ensemble exploration. Oracle validates each run.

name: Analysis & Validation
description: Explainability (SHAP, GradCAM), error analysis, ablation studies, statistical significance, reproducibility verification.

name: Packaging
description: Inference pipeline, model card, validation report, drift detection, test suite, clean delivery repo.
